headline: Today you reset: no snacking, hard movement, win
summary: You've gained 0.2kg this week while needing -0.61kg/week; today you stop emotional eating and commit to structured movement before Friday temptation hits.
details: Today: eat three portioned Huel meals only—zero snacking, no emotional crutches. Hit your rowing machine or treadmill for 45 minutes; rowing burns more kilojoules and builds mental toughness. This Wednesday reset matters because Friday is where you historically lose discipline, and you're 1801 days behind your goal—only consistent daily action closes that gap.
